rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"MongooseAdapter pool stats are accessed via `mongoose.connection.adapter` not directly on the connection object","scope":"MongoDB/Pool monitoring"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Database infrastructure code lives in `src/infra/db/` directory","scope":"Project structure"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Used `afterOpenConnection` callback in Payload connection string options to hook into connection lifecycle","scope":"Payload CMS config"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Pool stats structure: `pool.size` (max), `pool.available`, `pool.inUse`, `pool.waitQueues` on MongooseAdapter","scope":"MongoDB/Pool monitoring"}]}
